subject: +++Frohe Weihnachten und ein herzlichesDankeschön+++
body_text:
Liebe Community,

ein ereignisreiches Jahr neigt sich dem Ende zu und wir möchten euch herzlich für euer Vertrauen und die angenehme Zusammenarbeit Danken.

Wir wünschen euch und euren Liebsten ein frohes Weihnachtsfest, entspannte Feiertage und einen guten Start in das neue Jahr 2026!

Noch eine kurze Information über unsere Öffnungszeiten über die Feiertage findet ihr nachstehend:

22.12.2025 – 23.12.2025 - 09:00 – 16:00

24.12.2025 – 28.12.2025	Geschlossen

29.12.2025 – 30.12.2025 - 09:00 – 16:00 Uhr

31.12.2025 – 04.01.2026	Geschlossen

Ab dem 05.01.2026 sind wir wieder wie gewohnt für euch da.

Post und Pakete werden aber weiterhin wie gewohnt bearbeitet.

Nochmals vielen Dank für euer entgegengebrachtes Vertrauen. Wir freuen uns auf ein erfolgreiches neues Jahr 2026 mit euch.

Bleibt gesund und genießt die Feiertage!

Frohe Weihnachten!

Euer

CoWoS-Team

Du erhältst diese E-Mail, weil du als Mitglied bei CoWoS Berlin registriert bist.

Valuedfriends Workspaces GmbH

Kolonnenstr. 8
10827 Berlin

mail@cowos-berlin.com ( mailto:mail@cowos-berlin.com )

Datenschutzrichtlinie ( https://cowos-berlin.cobot.me/privacy-policy )

subject: 8 Takeaways from Carta’s State of Seed Report
body_text:
View this post on the web at https://speedrun.substack.com/p/8-takeaways-from-cartas-state-of

💡  This Week’s Big Ideas
🌍 Jon Lai’s Big Idea for 2026: World Models Will Take the Spotlight in Storytelling [ https://substack.com/redirect/18aae2d1-0016-4774-a666-6d72ad595fbd?j=eyJ1IjoiNTRjbDB4In0.woIuZ60MffrlGDsdpn_3Gb8spbUfXffYo0aHcFuwcjU ]
🍽️  Troy Kirwin’s Big Idea for 2026: Venture Capital Will Eat Private Equity [ https://substack.com/redirect/c335aa87-13e6-4a8d-b0ad-923de3730d63?j=eyJ1IjoiNTRjbDB4In0.woIuZ60MffrlGDsdpn_3Gb8spbUfXffYo0aHcFuwcjU ]
🎉  Kenan Saleh [ https://substack.com/redirect/269547b1-80f2-491a-8baa-176345c16959?j=eyJ1IjoiNTRjbDB4In0.woIuZ60MffrlGDsdpn_3Gb8spbUfXffYo0aHcFuwcjU ], the former GM at Lyft and co-founder of Halo, announced he’s joining the speedrun team!
💼  Join our talent network [ https://substack.com/redirect/ca04cc77-a6a0-44bf-9bbc-a273147620ef?j=eyJ1IjoiNTRjbDB4In0.woIuZ60MffrlGDsdpn_3Gb8spbUfXffYo0aHcFuwcjU ] for more opportunities. If we see a fit for you, we'll intro you to relevant founders in the portfolio.
When speaking with founders, we often explain speedrun as a16z’s “first check in” program for brand new startups. But what happens after teams raise that initial capital, get some early traction with customers, and find their first strong signals of product-market fit?
For many, the answer is: you want to raise a seed round. Capital unlocks hiring, accelerates growth, and gives startups the runway needed to build something for the long haul. So understanding the state of the seed market is critical for founders building at the early stage.
This year, we asked our friends at Carta what trends they’re seeing in the markets for seed stage startups. They kindly produced a comprehensive 40-slide report drawn from an aggregated and anonymized sample of Carta customer data. You can download it in full from the Carta website [ https://substack.com/redirect/ba0ad0a9-c132-46a2-bd0c-b9f97ed6bc9f?j=eyJ1IjoiNTRjbDB4In0.woIuZ60MffrlGDsdpn_3Gb8spbUfXffYo0aHcFuwcjU ]. If you’re a founder you’re going to want to check it out.
Below, we’ve highlighted a few points from Carta’s report that caught our attention.
1. There’s more cash available at seed, but it’s going into fewer rounds
Note the line indicating the full year estimates (FY Est) on these charts. 2025 is set to be the biggest year since 2022 in terms of cash raised, but that feature is split among slightly fewer teams—perhaps just just of 2,000 from Carta’s sample by the time the year is up.
2. Raises and valuations vary widely by sector
When splitting seed round data by sector, we see clear breakouts in round size and valuation among startups focused on semiconductors, hardware, and analytics tooling. 
But what about AI startups? The chart shows how things might look if you treated AI-focused software companies as their own industry. Unsurprisingly, it’d be among the biggest targets for capital.
3. Seed rounds = 20% 
Across all sectors and throughout the last 7 quarters, startups have consistently been selling around 20% of their companies when raising a seed round. Though some extreme outliers in AI sell as little as 10.5%, the 20% median figure has been consistent.
4. After raising a seed round, the road ahead is long
After raising a seed round, what are your odds of raising a Series A? This figure has been taking a dive after 2020, though there are early signs of improvements for the most recent cohorts.
Still, we’re seeing the median time between seeds and series As going up across the board in recent years. The pattern holds for the gaps between Series A and B rounds as well.
5. Where you build your startup matters
If you’ve ever wondered why so many investors put a disproportionate amount of energy and attention into SF startups, here’s one quantitative reason: Startups in just two cities, New York and San Francisco, capture two thirds of the top decile seed rounds when looking at US startups.
6. Teams are getting smaller
Funding may be going up, but Team sizes are trending lower at every stage. The average seed stage company now has 6.2 equity-holding employees, down from 10.3 at the 2021 peak.
As you might expect, the trend toward smaller team sizes is also reflected in the hiring data. The first half of 2025 has had the lowest hiring rate since before 2019.
7. More founders are going it solo
We’ve speculated before that the rise of AI tools would enable more small and even solo teams. There’s some evidence that this is already happening, as the number of solo-founded startups goes up and the relative proportion of teams with three or more founders drops proportionately. 
But many VCs still express a preference for teams with cofounders, and that preference shows up in the funding data. Solo founded startups in 2024 were about half as likely to have VC funding as teams with two cofounders.
8. Founding team breakups are common. 
It’s not all wine and roses for teams with cofounders, though. From 2017 to 2021, about a quarter of all 2-founder startups suffered through a founder breakup within their first four years.
It may be too early to say whether this trend is easing, though even in the best of years measured (2015 and 2016), nearly a fifth of 2-founder startups had a breakup by year four. 
That’s it for our summary, but there’s far more where that came from in the full report from Carta [ https://substack.com/redirect/ba0ad0a9-c132-46a2-bd0c-b9f97ed6bc9f?j=eyJ1IjoiNTRjbDB4In0.woIuZ60MffrlGDsdpn_3Gb8spbUfXffYo0aHcFuwcjU ]. Let us know what surprised you most about their findings!
For more weekly dives into the world of early stage startups, subscribe below.
Get the a16z speedrun newsletter weekly 👇
You are receiving this newsletter since you opted in earlier; if you would like to opt out of future newsletters, you can unsubscribe immediately.

This newsletter may link to other websites and certain information contained herein has been obtained from third-party sources. While taken from sources believed to be reliable, a16z has not independently verified such information and makes no representations about the enduring accuracy of the information or its appropriateness for a given situation.
References to any companies, securities, or digital assets are for illustrative purposes only and do not constitute an investment recommendation or offer to provide investment advisory services. Any references to companies are for illustrative purposes only; please see a16z.com/investments [ https://substack.com/redirect/f087ad16-def7-47e8-ae83-20ba96be582a?j=eyJ1IjoiNTRjbDB4In0.woIuZ60MffrlGDsdpn_3Gb8spbUfXffYo0aHcFuwcjU ]. Furthermore, this content is not directed at nor intended for use by any investors or prospective investors, and may not under any circumstances be relied upon when making a decision to invest in any fund managed by a16z. Please see a16z.com/disclosures [ https://substack.com/redirect/109f956f-e47b-4f7e-a79e-09587037c22e?j=eyJ1IjoiNTRjbDB4In0.woIuZ60MffrlGDsdpn_3Gb8spbUfXffYo0aHcFuwcjU ] for additional important details.

How Karpathy Uses LLMs, Why OpenAI Should Worry about Manus, andStanford’s Generative AI for DNA
body_text:
Welcome (back) to AI Minds, a newsletter about the brainy and sometimes zany world of AI, brought to you by the Deepgram editorial team.

### In this edition:

* 🎥  Stanford’s Evo 2 is Generative AI for DNA Sequences

* 🚘  HERMES: Better Vision and Understanding for Self-Driving Cars

* 🤖  Why human-AI Relationships need Socioaffective Alignment

* 📚  How Karpathy Uses LLMs

* 🐦  Social Media Buzz: Should Open AI Be Worried about Manus?

* 💼  MIT on Analyzing Your Company’s “AI Maturity Level”

* ⚡ Technical Webinar: How to Build Responsive Voice Agents

* 🧑‍💻  Poised now turns your spoken words into working code!

* 📲  Three new, trending AI Apps for you!

* 🎙️  AI Minds Podcast with Simrat Singh, Co-Founder at Hooman Labs

Thanks for letting us crash your inbox; let’s party. 🎉

----------
**Looking for a cutting-edge AI medical transcription model? Click **[here](https://deepgram.com/learn/introducing-nova-3-medical-speech-to-text-api)**. **🥳


--------------------
View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/18c135d7-112b-4588-8b9f-659e512b4066/div-2.gif?t=1700246279)
Caption: 


----------# 🎥 Stanford’s Evo 2: Generative AI for DNA

Youtube: Generative AI for DNA (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=tgNDNeveCog)

Imagine ChatGPT, but instead of writing words, it writes the DNA sequence required to produce a human with green eyes… or a person who’s likely going to grow over 6 feet tall… or someone with a natural talent for playing piano.

Do we have such technology already? Well perhaps it’s not too far out of reach.

“Stanford scientists have developed a generative AI tool that can predict the form and function of proteins coded in the DNA of all domains of life, identify molecules that could be useful for bioengineering and medicine, and allow labs to run dozens of other standard experiments with a virtual query – in minutes or hours instead of years (or millennia).

The open-source, all-access tool, known as Evo 2, was developed by a multi-institutional team co-led by Stanford’s Brian Hie, an assistant professor of chemical engineering and a faculty fellow in Stanford Data Science. Evo 2 was trained on a dataset that includes all known living species, including humans, plants, bacteria, amoebas, and even a few extinct species.”

----------
View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/18c135d7-112b-4588-8b9f-659e512b4066/div-2.gif?t=1700246279)
Caption: 


----------# 🔍  How AI Cars Can Improve Their Vision and Why Human-AI Relationships Need Socioaffective Alignment

View image: (https://lh7-rt.googleusercontent.com/docsz/AD_4nXeogvKnUEC-RJNuQCOH9R1ueB2RYAhCg4h4v5GUah3CRnYximSiLpyfq1VBGvworO7oZ0xjs5Nh5-VlEKdyuCIc83Fypsy4KUIe9hRBKivK2cN2I89fHZjiVt3YoVuBQyPfExiQ?key=gFAoDtgqOKr28gdtoo1QNjMZ)
Follow image link: (https://arxiv.org/abs/2501.14729)
Caption: 

[HERMES: A Unified Self-Driving World Model for Simultaneous 3D Scene Understanding and Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2501.14729) - This paper presents a unified Driving World Model named HERMES, which integrates 3D scene understanding and future scene evolution (generation) through a unified framework in driving scenarios. It leverages a Bird's-Eye View (BEV) representation to consolidate multi-view spatial information while preserving geometric relationships and interactions.

———————————————————————————

View image: (https://lh7-rt.googleusercontent.com/docsz/AD_4nXfTK93BkyA4UcOMbMOnu5LY8hBqj4KACe7lAWG-oCYqB-Rglx8UkcS-FPp3aDeTCH-q_a6rpt5KWjfuGOt91PddUyXs6ZtOhxzzmMYpN3hCv07Z_H4mIYDwQ2kIIAHL0hh20KBMgA?key=gFAoDtgqOKr28gdtoo1QNjMZ)
Follow image link: (https://arxiv.org/abs/2502.02528)
Caption: 

[Why human-AI relationships need socioaffective alignment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2502.02528) - As AI capabilities advance, humanity faces a new challenge: the emergence of deeper, more persistent relationships between humans and AI systems. This paper explores how increasingly capable AI agents may generate the perception of deeper relationships with users, especially as AI becomes more personalised and agentic.

----------
View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/18c135d7-112b-4588-8b9f-659e512b4066/div-2.gif?t=1700246279)
Caption: 


----------# 🐝 Social Media Buzz: How Karpathy Uses LLMs, and Should OpenAI Worry about Manus?

Tweet:  (https://twitter.com/AlphaSignalAI/status/1895851645767966963)

———————————————————————————

Tweet:  (https://twitter.com/godofprompt/status/1898647301922627739)

———————————————————————————

Tweet:  (https://twitter.com/MITSloan/status/1897325001235214337)

----------
View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/18c135d7-112b-4588-8b9f-659e512b4066/div-2.gif?t=1700246279)
Caption: 


----------# ⚡ Technical Deep Dive: How to Build Responsive Voice Agents with Vonage & Deepgram

View image: (https://lh7-rt.googleusercontent.com/docsz/AD_4nXeC6c8VHA68sQTtjy7esce5i_DKPuA7XtcP5Yfy3cHSZbr0-QvoXIpHYd2sD3EEN0wSBWpued9pHn5La1UTrutZSfWyUTUdMBtFENNU38idVr3HPV1UwKOuu9_mJa8Q9cOMnVu2zA?key=gFAoDtgqOKr28gdtoo1QNjMZ)
Follow image link: (https://www.crowdcast.io/c/vonagedeepgram?utm_source=deepgram&utm_medium=deepgram&utm_campaign=deepgram)
Caption: 

Learn how to build human-like voice agents for customer support, appointment scheduling and more in our March 26th technical webinar with Vonage.

When: Wednesday 26th March 2025, 10:00 PT / 12:00 ET / 17:00 GMT

Where: Online

[Save your spot here!](https://www.crowdcast.io/c/vonagedeepgram?utm_source=deepgram&utm_medium=deepgram&utm_campaign=deepgram)

_Hosted by_:

* Benjamin Aronov, Developer Advocate at Vonage

* Tony Chan, Senior Solutions Engineer at Vonage

* Damien Murphy, Applied Engineer at Deepgram

———————————————————————————

# 🔊 Poised for coding is here! Write code with your voice

Youtube: Poised shortcut for coding demo (https://youtu.be/QdK4BvU_Qy0?si=qr4kiMHlZyGBYH2z)

Your days of hunching over a keyboard writing lines of code are officially optional. Poised now turns your spoken words into working code! There are two ways to code with your voice:

1. 🤖 **Vibe coding**: Speak naturally about what you want to build, hit a keystroke, and watch your words transform into code in Cursor, Replit, or your favorite AI editor. Lean back, sip your coffee, and create.

2. ⌨️  **Interactive Coding**: Speak naturally and watch your words convert to code. "Create a function that sorts an array of user objects by their signup date" → Boom. Done.

Plus, you can add new prompts or customize existing prompts to match your coding style and preferences. Say goodbye to carpal tunnel! 👍️ 

P.S. We'd love to feature your voice coding success stories. Share how you're using this feature by tagging us on social media (@[poisedhq](https://x.com/poisedhq?ref_src=twsrc%5Egoogle%7Ctwcamp%5Eserp%7Ctwgr%5Eauthor))!

----------
View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/18c135d7-112b-4588-8b9f-659e512b4066/div-2.gif?t=1700246279)
Caption: 


----------# 📲 Three new, trending AI Apps for you!

View image: (https://lh7-rt.googleusercontent.com/docsz/AD_4nXfiugRLCWnVDFGYJTMnBWQonu6Jh8_lDLUQdu8T4okLfwjHgLNx5bqVOrx4UK6FzJYFNFh-Lf7b12WdL-1w2U6ZC65f6ZodcrBlCYAC5A0LjHUdnLNiozKVFae_TWn2iLdv4729?key=gFAoDtgqOKr28gdtoo1QNjMZ)
Follow image link: (https://deepgram.com/ai-apps/cleanvoice-ai)
Caption: 

[Cleanvoice AI](https://deepgram.com/ai-apps/cleanvoice-ai) is an artificial intelligence software that removes filler sounds, stuttering, and mouth sounds from podcasts or audio recordings. It’s designed to save podcasters hours of tedious editing work.

———————————————————————————

View image: (https://lh7-rt.googleusercontent.com/docsz/AD_4nXd3koQ3boJ_Co2KJX-Eq5EgLSiAPuvHT1FsR4Ilgb3YhxPFApzx7BklXnbGb0hs2nJD8jUYys7AxJMxZ7qhrbHljwMyWhbtkrhj-7gwDrjziW84Kp22Wdax_4ugEp3e_UCizrdl9w?key=gFAoDtgqOKr28gdtoo1QNjMZ)
Follow image link: (https://deepgram.com/ai-apps/docalysis)
Caption: 

[Docalysis](https://deepgram.com/ai-apps/docalysis) is an innovative AI-powered platform designed to transform how users interact with their documents. By leveraging artificial intelligence, Docalysis allows users to upload PDF, TXT, CSV, or DOCX files and engage in conversational queries to extract valuable insights and information without manually sifting through pages.

———————————————————————————

View image: (https://lh7-rt.googleusercontent.com/docsz/AD_4nXfuO3fly56ifiQyK3tTqht9VhdsQ9jc9n8RoPTYqQL8ZemZVb05veCtbUUO9u58aP6MNfH2cAFLoTEVLClLMIMMXSjYwkfmi7Z0qgvE49ajI1SZbqc2VEAkxFwWeuyCwIn2_ubLbA?key=gFAoDtgqOKr28gdtoo1QNjMZ)
Follow image link: (https://deepgram.com/ai-apps/duino-code-generator)
Caption: 

[The Arduino Code Generator](https://deepgram.com/ai-apps/duino-code-generator) is a powerful tool designed for hobbyists and developers looking to create projects with Arduino boards. Leveraging the sophistication of OpenAI’s GPT-3.5-turbo language model, this generator provides a seamless way to create code tailored to specific Arduino tasks.

----------
View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/18c135d7-112b-4588-8b9f-659e512b4066/div-2.gif?t=1700246279)
Caption: 


----------# 🎤 The AI Minds Podcast

Youtube: Simrat Singh, Co-Founder at Hooman Labs | AI Minds #052 (https://youtu.be/OHKc3zmTTz8?si=ACZRSbh1WArKxVp8)

Simrat Singh, Co-Founder at Hooman Labs, a startup building voice agents to help companies communicate with their customers over calls more efficiently. From consulting at McKinsey to private equity, Simrat realized he wanted a more hands-on role in building businesses, leading him to co-found Hooman Labs.

Simrat emphasizes that AI startups don’t need deep technical expertise but rather a clear understanding of how to solve real business problems using existing AI tools, prompt engineering, and API integrations.


———

subject: You just made a payment
Tips for safeguarding your account
body_text:
Qonto ( http://qonto.com/en )

Stay alert to fraud

Stay alert to fraud

Hello Meghdad,

Safeguarding your account is our top priority.

>From Strong Customer Authentification (SCA) to 3D Secure (3DS2), we’ve put the best security systems in place to keep your Qonto account safe.

But fraudsters will keep trying their luck, so we need you to stay vigilant against their most common techniques:

*
Phishing: scammers try to steal your personal information ( https://qonto.com/en/security?utm_source=qonto_internal&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=Prevent_fraud&utm_content=phising_page_en ) via fake emails or login pages that imitate Qonto’s.
*
Spoofing: fraudsters pose as a Qonto advisor and call you ( https://support-de.qonto.com/hc/en-us/articles/23949190237713?utm_source=qonto_internal&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=Prevent_fraud&utm_content=spoofing_faq_en ) - asking you to make a
transaction on your account. They also have tools to display any phone number or name, so it can even look like we’re calling you.
*
Investment scams: fake companies contact you, promising high and rapid returns on investment.

Stay one step ahead of fraudsters

In addition to Qonto’s security measures, you can protect yourself against fraudsters by adopting the right reflexes:

*
Never reveal your login credentials, bank details, or card numbers on unknown websites or to third parties - even if they claim to be from Qonto on a secure vocal server. We will never ask you for your SMS verification codes or to make a transfer.
*
Double check the website URL when you connect to Qonto. Bookmark the Qonto login page as a favorite in your browser - the authentic page will always have this exact URL: https://app.qonto.com/signin/ ( https://app.qonto.com/detectapp.html?appUrl=deeplinks%3Faction%3Dsignin )
*
Never approve a transaction or login to your account at the request of a third party. Qonto will never ask you to do this.
*
Carefully read the notifications and verification SMS messages you receive when transactions are made on your account. Make sure it was you who initiated them and that you recognize the IBAN and recipient names.

Help center ( https://support-de.qonto.com/hc/en-us?utm_source=qonto_internal&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=signature&utm_content=FAQ_en )

Have a question?

If you notice any unusual activity on your account, contact us immediately at support@qonto.com or by chat when you’re signed in to the app.

Go to help center ( https://support-de.qonto.com/hc/en-us?utm_source=qonto_internal&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=signature&utm_content=FAQ_en )

Qonto ( https://qonto.com/en )

We collect and process your personal data so we can send you updates on products and industry news. Learn more ( https://qonto.com/en/legal-documents/privacy-notice ) about how we manage your data and your rights.

Qonto is the commercial name of Olinda SAS, a simplified joint stock company under French law, registered in the Paris Trade Register under n° 819 489 626, with registered office in Paris, 18 rue de Navarin, 75009 Paris, VAT-ID: FR10819489626. Qonto is a payment institution regulated by the ACPR in France under number CIB 16958.

body_text:
Thanks for trying CoderPad - here are some helpful tutorials to get you started!

Welcome to CoderPad!

Thank you for starting your CoderPad trial. We hope you're able to discover how both you and your hiring teams can create a remarkable candidate experience, give your engineering teams a collaborative interviewing environment they’ll love, and make the best hires for your company.

To get the most out of the trial, we encourage you to explore how to:

- Create technical tests in under 30 seconds
- Pick the best candidates to send to hiring managers
- Preview the coding environment engineers will hold their coding interviews in
- See the interview experience from the candidate’s point of view

subject: An urgent note about your account

body_text:
Hi Meghdad,

Ich wollte kurz nachfragen – hattest Du schon Gelegenheit, meine letzte Nachricht zu lesen? Falls nicht, hier die Kurzfassung: Wir helfen dir mit dem Video-Feed auf LinkedIn mehr Reichweite zu generieren; im Schnitt über 1.000.000 Impressionen im ersten Monat!

Hast Du diese Woche 15 Minuten für einen kurzen Austausch?

Ich freue mich drauf, von Dir zu hören!

Viele Grüße

Jan Reuther

subject: Re: Meghdad & Hygge | After call letter
body_text:
Hello Meghdad,

I hope you’re doing well. I wanted to reconnect and see how things are
going on your side. Are there any upcoming projects or initiatives where
AI, automation, or custom software development could play a role?

If it’s helpful, I can also share a brief update on what we’ve been working
on recently at Hygge Software - new AI case studies, custom software
solutions, and bots/agents that have delivered measurable results for other
teams.

Would it make sense to schedule a short call this or next week to explore
if there’s a fit, or would you prefer I check back at a later time?

Looking forward to hearing from you,
--

forward to hearing from you soon!

Uliana

subject: Meghdad & Hygge | After call letter
body_text:
Hello Meghdad,

Thank you for such a great conversation on Monday. It was truly a pleasure
to meet you, learn more about what you’re working on, and explore how we
can best assist you with the ongoing projects!

I hope this meeting can be a good stepping stone toward a sustainable
relationship where you’d always feel confident leaning on us as a reliable
tech partner.

Just to reiterate – we cover all stages of software development and have
the capabilities to implement projects of different scopes and complexities
for various industries, specifically:
*Aviation, Education, Healthcare, Fintech, Manufacturing, Construction,
E-commerce, and more.*
Moving forward, as per our conversation, I attached here *a signed NDA*
from our side. Now we’re looking forward to receiving the relevant
information from your side so we can begin analyzing and estimating it.

Besides that, as we agreed during the call, I'm sending you a CV of our
lead senior backend expert - *Andriy Gnyp*. Please find his CV attached.


Just imagine, Andriy has been working as a software engineer since 1989 and
has a strong knowledge of *Python/Django, Linux, virtualization
technologies such as VMware Server, QEMU/KVM, Xen, Docker, and major cloud
platforms, including AWS, Azure, GCP, and many other technos*. Among
ourselves, we call him BBC (Born Before Computers) as he has incredible
knowledge in mathematics and technologies.


I have had the pleasure of working with Andriy on several projects in the
past, and I can confidently say that he is a very smart and responsible
programmer. Andriy has extensive expertise in various development fields.
He has experience in bringing startup projects to life from scratch and
supporting complex code after weak developers have worked on it. All of his
previous team members have enjoyed working with him due to his nice and
intelligent nature. Most importantly, he is a dedicated developer who will
work until he satisfies everyone.


Andriy’s hourly rate is just *EUR 40*. If you are looking for an expert
with both deep and broad expertise, Andriy could be a valuable option, as
he is worth every penny.


That said, it would be more prudent to focus on the *overall cost of
project delivery* rather than the rate of a particular person. A lower rate
can be more expensive in the long run if it takes significantly longer to
complete the project or if there are too many issues to resolve.


So, we're looking forward to your response!
-------------------------------------------
More information about *Hygge.software *(Please note, this is just a small
part of what we've done so far -- the majority of our projects are under
NDA and we do not showcase them anywhere)

📌 Hygge Software presentation:* LINK
<https://drive.google.com/file/d/1CbQQ6E5FV721ElFD_cbXNcJMpwUvAvm5/view?usp=sharing>*

<https://drive.google.com/file/d/1-N9M53o7-DfqOwjkIkrqe8QZZYaf0MaY/view?usp=sharing>*

subject: New to invoicing: deposit invoices
body_text:
Qonto ( https://qonto.com/en?utm_source=qonto_internal&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=header&utm_content=website&utm_position=block_header_logo )

Get paid now - and again later

Start creating deposit invoices to get paid in advance, stay compliant & avoid manual errors.

Deposit invoices ( https://app.qonto.com/detectapp.html?appUrl=deeplinks%3Faction%3Dreceivable-invoices.new%26organization_slug%3Dstemnlp-gmbh-4570%26img%3Dimg1 )

Hello Meghdad,

Need to secure an advance payment before starting work or sending an order? We’ve got the perfect solution for you.

With Qonto’s new deposit invoice feature, you can:

*
Secure your cash flow, simply: generate a deposit invoice for an advance payment and then a balance invoice for the full amount - all calculated for you.
*
Stay compliant (without the hassle): get compliant deposit invoices, making it easy to keep clear records for your tax needs.
*
Reduce time spent & manual errors: create deposit invoices in just a few clicks. Automatically match up the quote, deposit and balance invoices, reducing manual miscalculations and increasing visibility.

Learn more ( https://support-de.qonto.com/hc/en-us/articles/31870240611473-How-to-create-a-deposit-invoice-and-a-balance-invoice?utm_source=qonto_internal&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=AR-deposit-invoices&utm_content=faq&utm_position=block_1_cta )

Create a deposit & balance invoice in 5 steps

*
Head to the Quotes section of your Qonto account and select an approved quote. Click on Create deposit invoice. Or visit Invoices > Client invoices > Create invoice & switch on the Deposit invoice toggle.
*
Specify the deposit amount or percentage, add a description (optional) & review the calculated amount.
*
Click Create Invoice to generate your deposit invoice immediately.
*
>From the deposit invoice, create a balance invoice for the remaining amount, which is automatically calculated.
*
Access the quote, deposit & balance invoices from any of the related documents in your account.

Create your first invoice ( https://app.qonto.com/detectapp.html?appUrl=deeplinks%3Faction%3Dreceivable-invoices.new%26organization_slug%3Dstemnlp-gmbh-4570%26cta%3Dcta2 )

Help center ( https://support-de.qonto.com/hc/en-us?utm_source=qonto_internal&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=signature&utm_content=FAQ_en&utm_position=block_signature_img )

Have a question?

Take a look at our help center or contact us by chat from your account.

Go to help center ( https://support-de.qonto.com/hc/en-us?utm_source=qonto_internal&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=signature&utm_content=FAQ_en&utm_position=block_signature_cta )

Qonto ( https://qonto.com/en )

We collect and process your personal data so we can send you updates on products and industry news. Learn more ( https://qonto.com/en/legal-documents/privacy-notice ) about how we manage your data and your rights.

Qonto is the commercial name of Olinda SAS, a simplified joint stock company under French law, registered in the Paris Trade Register under n° 819 489 626, with registered office in Paris, 18 rue de Navarin, 75009 Paris, VAT-ID: FR10819489626. Qonto is a payment institution regulated by the ACPR in France under number CIB 16958.

twitter ( https://twitter.com/getqonto )

blog ( https://qonto.com/en/blog )

linkedin ( https://www.linkedin.com/company/qonto )

qonto.com ( https://qonto.com/en )

Contact the DPO ( dpo@qonto.com )

subject: Welcome to Deepgram! 👋

Steps to start building with voice AI

deepgram-101014 (https://e.deepgram.com/e3t/Ctc/5D+113/cQMRG04/VXkwy53YVZNhW6Rfm581JN2-7W7swsJQ5rRkJBN3kz7CY3prCCW69sMD-6lZ3mhN5c-RCj1d3ZSW52hZ111RzsyhVDF49K2HBWhSW5bpw3T8w86GxW45kL4M1nD9LNW8rJPHM1RyMDjW91N5797Pkk3fW6pDX9v13c8_FW3kysfW5jlpv5W1F7l9_1Gg7HRW4F4Lf21yrbdFN3zycjrsh1kCW6nY9N079SK56W3YT7Dm76QVTcN2pkZD-hPdhJN5XY4l9LqPTPW88HV1053LxbPW4zkGGx6b8ZXcVJkFwK2yhQD-W4NbPxh3Hrfl4f3235cY04 )

Let's Build: Welcome to Deepgram's Voice AI Platform!

Hi there,

Thanks for joining the voice revolution! You’re in very good company, and we’re eager to see what you build with our voice AI platform.

You’re one step closer to creating innovative voice applications using Deepgram (https://e.deepgram.com/e3t/Ctc/5D+113/cQMRG04/VXkwy53YVZNhW6Rfm581JN2-7W7swsJQ5rRkJBN3kz7CY3prCCW69sMD-6lZ3mhN5c-RCj1d3ZSW52hZ111RzsyhVDF49K2HBWhSW5bpw3T8w86GxW45kL4M1nD9LNW8rJPHM1RyMDjW91N5797Pkk3fW6pDX9v13c8_FW3kysfW5jlpv5W1F7l9_1Gg7HRW4F4Lf21yrbdFN3zycjrsh1kCW6nY9N079SK56W3YT7Dm76QVTcN2pkZD-hPdhJN5XY4l9LqPTPW88HV1053LxbPW4zkGGx6b8ZXcVJkFwK2yhQD-W4NbPxh3Hrfl4f3235cY04 ) 's APIs for speech-to-text, text-to-speech, and intelligence.

We can’t wait to see what you build!

The Deepgram Team

What's Next?

Put Deepgram to the test:

Create an API key (https://e.deepgram.com/e3t/Ctc/5D+113/cQMRG04/VXkwy53YVZNhW6Rfm581JN2-7W7swsJQ5rRkJBN3kz7DR3prCCW7Y8-PT6lZ3ndW82BpFM65N2wxW5gSVnn5WgDMfW8McbRR6rfhWKW7Wdqmk2RQlCSW4txt8y5WWtQcVHrCSz8ltvLvW7RC-MK81h24gW1GxfCD1bQQyWN1jyFMx5DX7XW4828hD2mwscyW83CxmY7twbV8VHNhGc4PJfSGVrgSdK3gtxLBW8xm27p11YblvW47w75l9758BFW5VQJlh4LmzBBW4D9SZ-6Sy0cyW7StL6Z8ZnyCDW32B0tt8ZBN-vW6C2FhN5FY1yPW57rW0w8s-W8_W17xV743CZs6mW1rjFB39hQlv3W2Mgbwb9bZ6flW1jtKCD567yfdVhgd7g48wbM5f5MFLmY04 ) (make note of it, you’ll need it later)

Make your first API request (https://e.deepgram.com/e3t/Ctc/5D+113/cQMRG04/VXkwy53YVZNhW6Rfm581JN2-7W7swsJQ5rRkJBN3kz7DR3prCCW7Y8-PT6lZ3pxW76QWWZ8kk6PmVZCVVw5P9DvQW1rnH5j2WGKcwW6N9rHn7nMVfBN3H-7lJkS7_SW38SpTF1l41c1W5DqMNP10_T8GW5Rx-yK7Q9183W4WB3x74Xl0VYW1RK0DS30mHf-VVYMvn1dWZj_W66q8pW18WtD1W3vShtr7TJHZDW2SBnNf6cpyJXW6Wx_1b5frlfnW6lMr4y3tMR35W17GGcl96XM_0W2K4hmq3XWgTlVX6psf85ByCmW82rb0b1q3hmGM92nwyB7KlKW8_QRpl3XDJfbW4jP5bY4Pb5yRW9cD8CZ1w7lyGW5JVk4j98FJZjN2nHKcZkVvtff17TPtY04 ) or try the  API Playground (https://e.deepgram.com/e3t/Ctc/5D+113/cQMRG04/VXkwy53YVZNhW6Rfm581JN2-7W7swsJQ5rRkJBN3kz7Dd3prCCW6N1vHY6lZ3nWW84BpKq5BkM9tW5jlbyl3hLg_pW23qLj86n0Rb0W8hq7B27-5k5NW7R5wm13SXB4pW972yg32Qg8kVW2L5lyN2Jms1VW29qkPv48J9y1W5nqDws3_v4p1W2-qVWm13P6HzW3ncwDt6KCzlZW2-pyq34Q8NYZV9RwZ-3YctXDW5SDv8B2VTpVKVhkRwv1TndcCW2VH2Gb3sY734W3tnsQm334Sr4W929QRz8Ctry1W6NLqd-87PfrHN46VhhxGHVLbW5bC9Z78_6X75W3PZsl6839MYSf1Rd-cz04 ) to make a request (no code required)

Explore our documentation (https://e.deepgram.com/e3t/Ctc/5D+113/cQMRG04/VXkwy53YVZNhW6Rfm581JN2-7W7swsJQ5rRkJBN3kz7Dx3prCCW7lCdLW6lZ3n9W5s8FjF516x1_VCK4Jb2S7623W8JYpyh8jkH6RW2xrnYG1SrShbW4TcfXl1VBgx6W4J7qyP2KnypbW3qL46b1PmrXKVV-CyP4ByS6fN8lWkxm1j4w7VXwZCt1jgT_cW2DNNHq3zkQX4W7tf4dS8QSVWzN53wmtWDnDf7W7XFYRP55MkqJVNRvfW3QvW_0W6gqyhk6bN402V4WJP83ZZz8PW2NR_804jzPnCW3_ZjJW1FDMbrW4zfpBv7hHTHbW2bvWs64qrnqCW6C2CTn4X3_LfW3VxjWG6F6DtPW4StxxZ7zhwqFf6WZVBl04 ) to find all the information you need

Transcribe audio in pre-recorded or real-time streaming

We cover the basics of transcribing pre-recorded audio (https://e.deepgram.com/e3t/Ctc/5D+113/cQMRG04/VXkwy53YVZNhW6Rfm581JN2-7W7swsJQ5rRkJBN3kz7F63prCCW8wLKSR6lZ3mnN55VCtj9gsptW43fDpy9174ppW8n-Vv41vgp0kW8Y0KRZ2JQJ1nVsCh9P5VrflHW6mqNkf5YpG8JW843-8G5RNcx_W5DksfS365502W1rq63c8DPzrMW54wqxm8l5BN8W2vFL2Y7lCQfqW9kfS8y1g8bkqW4m_ywh6TGXH7W1dJHB18zYKQTN2dSxgzMTgM1W4nR3BW36M0tXW61QVkL5FKPxCN2BGcF5jWPQJW9kdFjm54vMygW2TTbWj1mfx36W6Tch3K57hnWHW4St9Vc4-YyC0W3KLx3S8WSK9QW8PmHQ_38K7qKW2sVZb462C6QCW3QHjPW8D6z0JW90QP8M3W6V1WW5Kbb-n7lgBVqf6zYLC-04 ) or real-time (https://e.deepgram.com/e3t/Ctc/5D+113/cQMRG04/VXkwy53YVZNhW6Rfm581JN2-7W7swsJQ5rRkJBN3kz7F63prCCW8wLKSR6lZ3ksW1bzWMH6MgnmGW6h2BYw7fzPzNW4cJXbz7_9TF8W8WYxVy6jfGCxVsGQ7M5lS9kHW3r8CFR7HhD4vW4sJ_3Q3wlxfwW22YXmC77Mh2FW2f3Zzp85B_83W4sv1Nq6KMSFmW9h2vtl3WgFMjN6YSjC3flj25V3W1jQ5WX17PW7bPB8F9l8BX0W3rN5-R6ssfmLW7YsYfS5jDzCzN1GJhd6ZtTBgW4MD1PP2wjcPgW2vXbgd7m_S0DW6WWgNH6blj5bW7xG0dP1mhftRN7qHqHGpjmxKW26NXF522wLTDW6X-T6B7TYntKW2Fj93K7_MFZNV8nHPF31bqlyW9b8WCB7lsfHjW82rQbY8J_d_kf2fSkGY04 ) streaming audio (https://e.deepgram.com/e3t/Ctc/5D+113/cQMRG04/VXkwy53YVZNhW6Rfm581JN2-7W7swsJQ5rRkJBN3kz7F63prCCW8wLKSR6lZ3ksW1bzWMH6MgnmGW6h2BYw7fzPzNW4cJXbz7_9TF8W8WYxVy6jfGCxVsGQ7M5lS9kHW3r8CFR7HhD4vW4sJ_3Q3wlxfwW22YXmC77Mh2FW2f3Zzp85B_83W4sv1Nq6KMSFmW9h2vtl3WgFMjN6YSjC3flj25V3W1jQ5WX17PW7bPB8F9l8BX0W3rN5-R6ssfmLW7YsYfS5jDzCzN1GJhd6ZtTBgW4MD1PP2wjcPgW2vXbgd7m_S0DW6WWgNH6blj5bW7xG0dP1mhftRN7qHqHGpjmxKW26NXF522wLTDW6X-T6B7TYntKW2Fj93K7_MFZNV8nHPF31bqlyW9b8WCB7lsfHjW82rQbY8J_d_kf2fSkGY04 ) in our quickstarts.

Gain insights from your audio at scale

Analyze audio using Deepgram's Audio Intelligence (https://e.deepgram.com/e3t/Ctc/5D+113/cQMRG04/VXkwy53YVZNhW6Rfm581JN2-7W7swsJQ5rRkJBN3kz7DR3prCCW7Y8-PT6lZ3lVW5CpZlB3sCvn4W3dMK5_5V-FcKW5RKdYL6Tx4t6W5z0Vfp18TD79W2hGT9P72tB2BW5P2JLK3cgkbsW6k5QxG6DlgKjW5j6W_436FphHVJP8wk7vtXkKW2tW7B02wM45CW2JQLSB5m-s9-W4cYJNQ7WlbkBW2kX4DK2KfmrjW1nMbDc7t8J0GN440PRGWtlYQW2RRsTD7LnNcPN8P67V3RQmvZVTB1WD9jNwzzW8Dk5wW6fjZjHW7l2lCq6NpPG0W2RG29K5vCtfSW5HkBLf8gDFkwW7nVN_Q6mjHBFN8Mdg_xGQvtMW4BhxK_62SY2TW6mJtSL1992tYdsnMgd04 ) or Text Intelligence (https://e.deepgram.com/e3t/Ctc/5D+113/cQMRG04/VXkwy53YVZNhW6Rfm581JN2-7W7swsJQ5rRkJBN3kz7DR3prCCW7Y8-PT6lZ3l2W1VSBRX7xKP1gW1HltqV9ctwzVN56xhQ6VThpTW6TWd4l3m-0BNW4h7_jh8MMfG0W1G6G0x25P8SlW4LRzpY8ytmh5W2XrBsb5mx1q_W7YCJWQ6WxCtwW4QJ3_M3LvfxTW5jRG4p2NrBSYW4GKkWL14zW-bW6gx6Gn5c2bgMVTWMny9cP8k-W4WCDqK1qwnshW48L7r_9bh2DMW2YhpfX1n_RjjW687rFK6pl3s5W6G57k-6j1JMlW6y32gj5_rZftV9hytc7rmTkxW1yqP8j68W5l-W2X2T9p2HbY4LW4MYW8-30rH17W1qWvhX3SzbknW4RWkRd68VCcbf2pJsVT04 ) features, Summarization, Topic Detection, Intent Recognition, and Sentiment Analysis.

Turn text into human-like voices

Here’s everything you need to get started (https://e.deepgram.com/e3t/Ctc/5D+113/cQMRG04/VXkwy53YVZNhW6Rfm581JN2-7W7swsJQ5rRkJBN3kz7Dx3prCCW7lCdLW6lZ3n9W19k6_x8BsCL1W2NwCQp5J0LLZW3XqwLV9kYgHhMXVzC1Hn6JmVv3GBt7_p32bN4DQQlpsL7fLW4gSQSD2cQ0XvW4xpDBg3NWPz2W2LM4LX5FC6tNW951dqK1WVN9bW8934g22cBn2_W8zQ7fr72VZjnW4-SJ9H49xTCRW7QhHpj9hBlSFW2KCRvX8T_Sw4W1VyKFR7XVb-fW5NzGjN64w8flW3Y8fRh87BCRsVZYlND1c6Vk-W5qG5kx3prj_sW62f6RV2ChFp8W5H45hQ1rJZcGW38cS9k6nVQNDW6Srl7h748ZvCf16JyM404 ) with Aura text-to-speech. Still need help?

Tag an expert in our community forums on Discord (https://e.deepgram.com/e3t/Ctc/5D+113/cQMRG04/VXkwy53YVZNhW6Rfm581JN2-7W7swsJQ5rRkJBN3kz7Dd3prCCW6N1vHY6lZ3ptVKWtxZ8Lx5HWW2xDdhh6zcBgqW29Th1D6hDx0QW5Bh7GF2stnwKW4qlKRk1s565-W5Dv3403jNYXSW66cRcC44cZCYN4MK4XCjFJ69W8GH5qC6n28N3W2Qr5BN1RNNVJN57jBZ4M4FddW8wp3021gSZHNW6rBdxw6qd--CW2Wj24r3XmJBmVjf-qX5kxL-pW5675zB8fvJNfW94chqR6RNYM-W4SmwdR7R439PW7grCdJ2ntSSgW6xcdXp5Tt2r7VzFFsm8mM8qfW2qMJJT3jF6XLf66Vhmv04 ) or Github (https://e.deepgram.com/e3t/Ctc/5D+113/cQMRG04/VXkwy53YVZNhW6Rfm581JN2-7W7swsJQ5rRkJBN3kz7Dx3prCCW7lCdLW6lZ3mGW4bbxJx4lZPvwN3c6PcW_j2fFW7dzH7w6jKFLVW6Z2_N942f6pvW25v4Ty1KRhzxW5vcRFt5Kj4rTW8l60jc19ZsLXVxjhk51lcVMcW3WVw317-GXgLW71ZN_D46XHCrW3B90yb7H6PZ6W8SyZcY1s8pQrN3TXcmGNCMPYW45yB0l25_GQqW4D7WKT5BPM8TW5yChNR2DvS7kW184gC_5G8qkTW3crxh21JJFDTN3Jvh1bb0w-rW2BhFj44zrcn4W8_Wqfb5WwwW9W7SJmm85_-j8lW3ph4fH4_9VvwW70VxVB3Ttbwsf7XpPPn04 ) .

Want to know more?

subject:
Elon Musk Releases Grok 3, Deepgram Releases Nova-3, and The Most
 Useful Thing AI has Ever Done
body_text:
Welcome (back) to AI Minds, a newsletter about the brainy and sometimes zany world of AI, brought to you by the Deepgram editorial team.

### In this edition:

* 🎥 Veritasium: The Most Useful Thing AI Has Ever Done

* 🔊 Deepgram releases Nova-3: Setting a New Standard for AI-Driven Speech-to-Text

* 🌪️ Is it even possible for AI to predict the weather?

* 💻 Rapid Mobile App Development for Generative AI Agents on MIT App Inventor

* 🧠 Social Media Buzz: Elon Musk released Grok-3 just hours ago

* ⛏️ Twitter: An fully AI Society thrives in Minecraft and how AI approaches the economy

* 📲 Three new, trending AI apps for you!

* 🎙️ AI Minds Podcast with Abdulrahman Jamjoom, Co-Founder and CEO at Arini AI

Thanks for letting us crash your inbox; let’s party. 🎉

----------
**Want to try high-accuracy, industry-leading transcription AI? Click **[here](https://playground.deepgram.com/?endpoint=listen&language=en&model=nova-3)**.**


--------------------
View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/18c135d7-112b-4588-8b9f-659e512b4066/div-2.gif?t=1700246279)
Caption: 


----------# 🎥 Veritasium: The Most Useful Thing AI Has Ever Done

Youtube: The Most Useful Thing AI Has Ever Done (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=P_fHJIYENdI)

AI is meant to solve problems. But what problem is the most important? Well, the YouTuber Veritasium has interviewed prominent researchers at Google DeepMind to come to this conclusion. Check it out!

----------
View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/18c135d7-112b-4588-8b9f-659e512b4066/div-2.gif?t=1700246279)
Caption: 


----------# ⚡ Deepgram releases Nova-3, Extending Leadership in Voice AI for Enterprise Use Cases

View image: (https://lh7-rt.googleusercontent.com/docsz/AD_4nXfiEvb8KLUQ7R-NrTDT4yCdT-aJ0GVd9o_CbmAcz_TJAWFT_YS4YNvX8frIFLZnFea443F_MVvtuxmjIWDvMz-dQmfdrfrz0cgmdxf1XTHl3i4BjkVUOTFCXi5--8Mzl8O_BJCG?key=qS2ihxPtRC_UfUpMhrSJylY7)
Follow image link: (https://deepgram.com/learn/introducing-nova-3-speech-to-text-api)
Caption: 

_[Introducing Nova-3: Setting a New Standard for AI-Driven Speech-to-Text](https://deepgram.com/learn/introducing-nova-3-speech-to-text-api)_

Nova-3 advances Deepgram's industry-leading accuracy, extending its capabilities to a broader range of real-world enterprise use cases and challenging audio conditions. It is the first voice AI model to offer real-time multilingual transcription.

Further, this latest model is also the first to provide users with demonstrably effective and highly accurate self-serve customization—enabling instant vocabulary adaptation without model retraining.

Nova-3 delivers industry-leading performance with a 54.3% reduction in word error rate (WER) for streaming and 47.4% for batch processing compared to competitors. It was also preferred over Whisper on 7 out of 7 languages tested—reaching as high as an 8-to-1 preference on certain languages.

To try Nova-3, click [here](https://playground.deepgram.com/?endpoint=listen&language=en&model=nova-3)!

----------
View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/18c135d7-112b-4588-8b9f-659e512b4066/div-2.gif?t=1700246279)
Caption: 


----------# 🔍  AI Predicting the Weather and MIT’s App Inventor

View image: (https://lh7-rt.googleusercontent.com/docsz/AD_4nXeycUrhvTBK6Twy_LN4mHz6yz4M_J31ns7H-OnBiD2iEPf4E3HGZynk2IAqzephTrRRZMq2jhL94QM4BaF5BQNN1Mvsca29OvfUSfw6rQZXpu_HfmJadsdPFqmj3CZr0laRKldTiQ?key=qS2ihxPtRC_UfUpMhrSJylY7)
Follow image link: (https://arxiv.org/abs/2309.10808)
Caption: 

[AI Foundation Models for Weather and Climate: Applications, Design, and Implementation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2309.10808) - Despite the progress of AI in the past few years, we are still in the nascent stages of a generalizable AI model for global Earth system models, regional climate models, and mesoscale weather models. This paper reviews current state-of-the-art AI approaches, primarily from transformer and operator learning literature in the context of meteorology.

———————————————————————————

View image: (https://lh7-rt.googleusercontent.com/docsz/AD_4nXcFTVX5EkOUHCgT1ZmBT8IdlFKfGcYeUhTjZRN6jCA9SZ3rWfbsTifHnPajpFx9d-tQFTBUhpGEVidetm-xM38F9OZ5Lpk1cf2rTtGAzOKHM7vO9MZs3t2x8PIXyUj8kDE4258I?key=qS2ihxPtRC_UfUpMhrSJylY7)
Follow image link: (https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.01561)
Caption: 

[Rapid Mobile App Development for Generative AI Agents on MIT App Inventor](https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.01561) - The authors of this paper present a methodology for the rapid development of AI agent applications using the development platform provided by MIT App Inventor.

----------
View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/18c135d7-112b-4588-8b9f-659e512b4066/div-2.gif?t=1700246279)
Caption: 


----------# 🐝 Social Media Buzz: Elon Releases Grok 3 and an AI-ruled Minecraft Society

Elon Musk releases Grok 3 tonight, a few hours after this newsletter is set to be published. Reviews on this technology should be coming next week! What are your expectations for Grok 3?

Tweet:  (https://twitter.com/elonmusk/status/1890958798841389499)

———————————————————————————

Tweet:  (https://twitter.com/Rainmaker1973/status/1890637161843593572)

———————————————————————————

Tweet:  (https://twitter.com/rohanpaul_ai/status/1889008151225327661)

----------
View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/18c135d7-112b-4588-8b9f-659e512b4066/div-2.gif?t=1700246279)
Caption: 


----------# 📲 Three new, trending AI Apps for you!

View image: (https://lh7-rt.googleusercontent.com/docsz/AD_4nXcqY-A0c_pyS0XYXxioBZQGB8H8whGsY-c_hT67VqyJEyNKiiz9DI6aLEZF5zAHSegkIfP-HhOpeMHfibTHarUV3HHQR9axS_kJXAZGdkDKjzZ17XDElewI0An1sgHW8vtwxI5A?key=qS2ihxPtRC_UfUpMhrSJylY7)
Follow image link: (https://deepgram.com/ai-apps/pimeyes)
Caption: 

[PimEyes](https://deepgram.com/ai-apps/pimeyes) provides a powerful AI-driven solution, allowing individuals to track and monitor their images online. It functions as an advanced facial recognition search engine, scanning the web for images that match a given face.

———————————————————————————

View image: (https://lh7-rt.googleusercontent.com/docsz/AD_4nXcg5Kegyp6WJHPjwh5LFvZv5Zk1oNn8HF5kwVK3Cshh7cyseV1NSbNouo-Al9Gi75cm2_p0shaQRlgU7F-U_Gkwe0skpl_9Iv4ilhgOpREUkBAck0Qby9xGEYzNUJsh_Ic_EwebRw?key=qS2ihxPtRC_UfUpMhrSJylY7)
Follow image link: (https://deepgram.com/ai-apps/emvoice)
Caption: 

[Emvoice](https://deepgram.com/ai-apps/emvoice) is a vocal synthesizer plugin and app that allows you to compose vocal music just by entering lyrics and notes. The vocals are generated using AI and performed by Emvoice's virtual singers such as Keela, Lucy, Jay, and Thomas.

———————————————————————————

View image: (https://lh7-rt.googleusercontent.com/docsz/AD_4nXeQHVYVPHASj4I8PxK8WpObEYUZjsr0urHX2CVLyl7te375NNEPYgtNNmjwwoGWl2m2Oxr-LJiJurNgPHL5YLbVszj6ty56QB4T-YLMN5kFeoucBahN-HJ3T3N2uWcwnyh_CwgRrw?key=qS2ihxPtRC_UfUpMhrSJylY7)
Follow image link: (https://deepgram.com/ai-apps/rezi)
Caption: 

[Rezi](https://deepgram.com/ai-apps/rezi) is an innovative, AI-powered resume builder that simplifies the process of creating professional, ATS-optimized resumes. Designed to help job seekers stand out, Rezi automates everything from resume writing to keyword optimization, enabling users to craft job-specific resumes in just minutes.

Caption: 


----------# 🎤 The AI Minds Podcast

Youtube: Abdulrahman Jamjoom, Co-Founder and CEO at Arini AI | AI Minds #049 (https://youtu.be/AB2H-ksqyxE?si=zKM8n1PydJL_uHKb)

Abdulrahman Jamjoom, Co-Founder and CEO at Arini AI, shares his journey from Saudi Arabia to Jordan and then to the U.S. He recounts his experiences at Threads and his determination to create a startup before even graduating from Harvard, which eventually led him to co-found Arini AI.

Abdul talks about the technical challenges of building scalable AI systems, highlighting the complexities involved in managing interruptions, minimizing latency, and ensuring accurate transcription, particularly in sensitive contexts such as insurance data.

subject: Candidates for Django and Devops position
body_text:
Hi Meghdad,

As promised, I’m following up with the candidates. Apologies for the delay
in preparing the resumes—it took longer because I initially wanted to share
profiles of our in-house developers. However, we didn’t have anyone with
the exact skill set required. Some are proficient in Django but haven’t
worked on DevOps tasks.

To ensure the candidate is a perfect fit for the position, I decided to
reach out to our bench. Could you please review the resumes and let me know
which candidates you’d like to interview? I’d also appreciate it if you
could share your available time slots for the interviews.

Valentyn M - 45 euro/h
Alisa M. - 40 euro/h
Milan V - 43 euro/h

Looking forward to your feedback.

Best Regards,

Artem Frolikov

Artem Frolikov

Founder & CEO

Confiance OÜ - Software

Development & IT Consulting

PRICE COMPONENTS AND METHODS OF PAYMENT

1. Ticket prices can exceed prices printed on the tickets. Depending on the event and the ordering method, payments may be made by credit card, giropay, Sofortüberweisung and/or by SEPA Core Direct Debit and/or by payment in advance (by bank giro transfer), or on invoice, or in instalments. VAT is included in the price. The total price for the order, including all fees, is due for payment immediately the contract is concluded if the method of payment is by credit card, giropay, Sofortüberweisung or SEPA Core Direct Debit. If payment is made in advance (by bank giro transfer), the total amount must be transferred in full , by the stated date, to the bank account specified by CTS EVENTIM AG & Co. KGaA. In the case of purchase on invoice, the invoice amount must be paid to Klarna Bank AB by the date specified on the invoice (14 days after invoice date). Purchase on invoice is not available as a payment method for all kinds of tickets and is also subject to a positive creditworthiness check by Klarna Bank. If the customer is allowed to purchase certain products on invoice, following a creditworthiness check, payment shall be processed in cooperation with Klarna Bank AB, to whom CTS EVENTIM AG & Co. KGaA assigns its claim to payment. In such a case, the customer can only discharge the debt by rendering payment to Klarna Bank AB. “Purchase on invoice” as a method of payment is also governed by the General Terms of Business: https://cdn.klarna.com/1.0/shared/content/legal/terms/0/en_de/user of Klarna Bank AB (publ).
2. When orders are placed online, service and shipping costs are charged – these can vary, depending on the event. These fees are displayed in the shopping cart when placing your order; no other, undisplayed costs are incurred. If you opt for Gift wrapping and/or Ticket insurance, these will be charged additionally to the costs displayed.

LEGAL INFORMATION

Right to cancel, example cancellation form
Consumers do not have a general right to cancel, and any right of consumers to cancel may lapse prematurely in the case of the following contracts:
1. Contracts for the provision of accommodation other than for residential purposes, the transport of goods, car rental services, catering, or services relating to leisure activities, where the contract provides for a specific date or period (Section 312g (2) Sentence 1 No. 9 BGB [German Civil Code]). That means that there is no right to cancel in cases where CTS EVENTIM AG & Co. KGaA offers services in the field of leisure activities, in particular admission tickets for events. Any order for tickets is therefore binding on the consumer once the order has been confirmed by CTS EVENTIM AG & Co. KGaA in accordance with Section II. 1 above, which means that the consumer has an obligation to accept and pay for the tickets ordered.
2. Contracts to supply audio or video recordings or computer software in a sealed package, if the seal is removed after delivery (Section 312g (2) Sentence 1 No. 6 BGB).
The following principles also apply to contracts concluded with consumers:
----------------------------------
Information on cancellation rights
Right to cancel
You have the right to cancel this contract within fourteen days, without giving any reason.
The 14-day cancellation period begins on the day on which the goods are received by you, or by a third party named by you, other than the carrier.
In order to exercise your right to cancel, you must notify us,
CTS EVENTIM AG & Co. KGaA, Customer Service, Contrescarpe 75A, D-28195 Bremen, +49 (0) 421 - 20 31 55 11, Fax: +49 (0) 421 36 66 777, E-Mail: info@eventim.de: info@eventim.de,
of your decision to cancel the contract by sending us a clear written statement to that effect (e.g. in a postal letter, telefax message or eMail). You may use the specimen cancellation form attached hereto, but are under no obligation to do so.
To keep within the cancellation period, it is sufficient if you send your notification of exercising your right to cancel before the cancellation period ends.
Consequences of cancellation
If you cancel this contract, we have to immediately refund to you any payments we have received from you, including delivery charges (except for the additional costs resulting from your choosing a different form of delivery than the standard, most favourable form offered by us), by no later than fourteen days after the day on which we receive notification of your cancelling this contract. To make the refund, we use the same means of payment as you used for the original transaction, unless explicitly agreed otherwise with you; you will not be charged anything for the refund. We may refuse to pay the refund until the goods have been returned to us or until you have provided proof that you sent the goods back, whichever is the earlier.
You must return or hand over the goods to us without delay, in any case no later than fourteen days after the day on which you notified us of your cancelling the contract. The latter deadline has been met if you dispatch the goods before the 14-day period has expired. The direct costs for returning the goods must be borne by you. You do not have to pay for any loss in the value of the goods unless such loss in value is due to your handling the goods in a manner other than is necessary to inspect the condition, properties and functioning of the goods.
Example cancellation form
If you wish to cancel the contract, please fill out this form and return it to us.
- To CTS EVENTIM AG & Co. KGaA, Customer Service, Contrescarpe 75A, D-28195 Bremen:
- I/We (*) hereby cancel the contract that I/We (*) entered into to purchase the following goods (*)/the following service (*)
- Ordered on (*)/received on (*)
- Name of the consumer(s)
- Address of the consumer(s)
- Signature of the consumer(s) (only if notification is on paper)
- Date
----------------------------------
(*) Please delete as applicable.
You can download the example cancellation form: https://www.eventim.de/obj/media/DE-eventim/pdf/Muster-Widerrufsformular-EVENTIM.pdf as pdf file.
**End of information on the right to cancel and specimen cancellation form
**
The following shall apply in the event of cancellation by the customer:
CTS EVENTIM AG & Co. KGaA may refuse to pay the refund until the goods have been returned to CTS EVENTIM AG & Co. KGaA or until the customer has furnished proof that the goods have been sent back, whichever is the earlier date.
The customer must return or hand over the goods to CTS EVENTIM AG & Co. KGaA without delay, in any case no later than fourteen days after the day on which the customer notified CTS EVENTIM AG & Co. KGaA of his or her cancelling the contract. The latter deadline has been met if the customer dispatches the goods before the 14-day period has expired. The customer shall bear the direct costs for returning the goods. The customer must pay for any loss in the value of the goods if such loss in value is due to the goods being handled in a manner other than is necessary to inspect the condition, properties and functioning of the goods.
Liability limitations, exclusion of withdrawal in the case of particular breaches of duty
1. CTS EVENTIM AG & Co. KGaA is unrestrictedly liable in all cases in accordance with the Product Liability Act for damages caused intentionally or through gross negligence, in the case of malicious concealment of defects, and for damages resulting from injury to life or health and physical injury. Liability for damages from breach of warranty is unlimited.
2. In the case of a breach of significant contractual obligations (so-called cardinal obligations) that are only based on simple negligence, CTS EVENTIM AG & Co. KGaA shall be liable limited to compensation for foreseeable losses typical for this type of contract.
3. Apart from the cases stated in paragraphs 1 and 2, CTS EVENTIM AG & Co. KGaA shall not be liable for losses caused by simple negligence.
4. The customer's right to free him/herself from the contract due to a breach of obligation for which the promoter or CTS EVENTIM AG & Co. KGaA is not responsible and in which the goods are not at fault is ruled out.
5. If the liability of CTS EVENTIM AG & Co. KGaA is ruled out or limited under the paragraphs above, this also applies to the liability of their agents and assistants.

------------------------------------------

Head Office: Hohe Bleichen 11, 20354 Hamburg
Postal Address: Contrescarpe 75 A, 28195 Bremen

Best
Robert

subject: Calibrion Technical Documentation
body_text:
New activity in the following document
Calibrion Technical Documentation  
(https://docs.google.com/document/d/1hsCqqxw-noLqLJns_eo-Hu2rvVcyytwzRJ0BgWTrPB4/edit?usp=comment_email_document&ts=67a1a024&usp_dm=false&tab=t.0)

2 resolved

Comments
.
Meghdad Farahmand
| Issue :
The issue section will handle the messages and notices on a data point.
Fields :
user
data_point_instt
data_point_cd
title
text
status
updated_by
created_at
updated_at

Endpoints:
Create:
Create the issue. Issue can connect to a instt or cd datapoint
Update:
Update an issue instance.
Detail:
Return the details of the issue instance.
Resolve:
An issue can be resolved by the reviewer, the RESOLVE is a status in the  
issue table (RESOLVE = 0 in DataBase).
The concept of resolving is closing issue with a success result
Close:
An issue can be closed by reviewer, the CLOSE is also an status in issue  
table (CLOSE = 1 in DataBase)
Comments:
Comments can be publish for a issue and this endpoint will return the  
comments that publish for the issue
Comment :
The comment section will handle the messages that will publish on data  
points.
Fields :
title
text
user
issue
data_point_instt
data_point_cd
comment
created_at
updated_at

Endpoints:
Create:
Create the comment instance. The comment i…

2. Complete the document by adding more explanation and describing these  
items.

subject: Lex Fridman on DeepSeek and GPUs, Scamming with Daisy AI Model, andMistral’s Newest AI Sidekick
body_text:
Welcome (back) to AI Minds, a newsletter about the brainy and sometimes zany world of AI, brought to you by the Deepgram editorial team.

### In this edition:

* 🎥 Guardian News: Scamming phone scammers with “Daisy the AI Granny”

* 🧑‍🔬 Research: How much do teams really trust LLMs with risky tasks?

* 📡 AI Researchers find out that LLMs are aware of their learned behaviors

* ⚡ Webinar: Build Real-time Voice Agents with Deepgram in Vonage AI Studio

* 🐦 Twitter: Karpathy’s latest LLM Deep-Dive and Mistral’s newest AI Sidekick!

* 🤖 The intelligent humanoid robot race is heating up

* 📲 Three new, trending AI apps for you!

* 🎙️ AI Minds Podcast with Co-founder and CEO of Hamming AI, Sumanyu Sharma

* 🎞️ DeepSeek's GPU optimization tricks | Lex Fridman Podcast

* 🧠 Wired: 2025 is the Year of the AI App

* 💎How Diffusion Models Are Reimagining Game Environments: DIAMOND

* 📚Glossary Entry: Deep Reinforcement Learning

Thanks for letting us crash your inbox; let’s party. 🎉

----------
**Deepgram released a brand new medical transcription model! Check it out **[here](https://deepgram.com/learn/best-medical-transcription-with-nova-2-medical-speech-to-text-api)**. **🥳


--------------------
View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/18c135d7-112b-4588-8b9f-659e512b4066/div-2.gif?t=1700246279)
Caption: 


----------# 🎥  Guardian News: Scamming Scammers with the “AI Granny”

Youtube: Daisy the 'AI granny' speaks to scammer: 'I'm a bit lost now' (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=bL9iJJICOLc)

Video Description: “O2 has introduced ‘AI granny’ Daisy for a short period to show what could be done with artificial intelligence to counter the scourge of scammers, who have become so ubiquitous.

Daisy is not a real grandmother but an AI bot created by computer scientists to combat fraud. Her task is simply to waste the time of the people who are trying to scam her. Using a mixture of ambivalence, confusion about how computers work and an eagerness to reminisce about her younger days, the ‘78 years young’ Daisy draws sighs and snapping from fraudsters on the other end of the line.”

----------
View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/18c135d7-112b-4588-8b9f-659e512b4066/div-2.gif?t=1700246279)
Caption: 


----------# 🔍 Research: Trusting LLMs with Risky Tasks and their Learned Behaviors

View image: (https://lh7-rt.googleusercontent.com/docsz/AD_4nXfXsbCnYDSmVJIn08NpHE-qSmm9WVBmn_bM6BLNyGVM4y6DCxIjbr4S563ULWeWSwI2XPzUgwrsrxrWrX6nyyQlRJzHiqlsnTi7k0ZbWI351r92fCCIJPQJrMeZBwiCoG081lwTDw?key=JHvDPZ5l4fbqXN4lJggYnYL9)
Follow image link: (https://arxiv.org/abs/2502.01390)
Caption: 

[An Empirical Study of User Trust and Team Performance When Using LLM Agents As A Daily Assistant](https://arxiv.org/abs/2502.01390) - Although LLM agents have shown a promising blueprint as daily assistants, there is a limited understanding of how they can provide daily assistance based on sequential decision making capabilities. The authors of this paper conduct an empirical study (N = 248) of LLM agents as daily assistants in six commonly occurring tasks with different levels of risk typically associated with them.

———————————————————————————

View image: (https://lh7-rt.googleusercontent.com/docsz/AD_4nXc3UyPZcHYxPyEgDyFqNoL4l2GYIFURHby3gElKvPtP4h2vSu9270V6YFWIFXfNuPDiMWTsx6pDCs0jcka7zvUpOJ9Rpghzf6J0XWgd_uxJLpqedDOYb5Q6iOsN7awNjc3PinIWxQ?key=JHvDPZ5l4fbqXN4lJggYnYL9)
Follow image link: (https://arxiv.org/abs/2501.11120)
Caption: 

[Tell me about yourself: LLMs are aware of their learned behaviors](https://arxiv.org/abs/2501.11120) - This paper studies behavioral self-awareness—an LLM's ability to articulate its behaviors without requiring in-context examples. The authors fine-tune LLMs on datasets that exhibit particular behaviors, such as (a) making high-risk economic decisions, and (b) outputting insecure code. Despite the datasets containing no explicit descriptions of the associated behavior, the fine-tuned LLMs can (surprisingly?) explicitly describe it.

----------
View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/18c135d7-112b-4588-8b9f-659e512b4066/div-2.gif?t=1700246279)
Caption: 


----------# ⚡ Webinar: Build Real-time Voice Agents with Deepgram in Vonage AI Studio

View image: (https://lh7-rt.googleusercontent.com/docsz/AD_4nXcQb4-5hszuiX1vuOYyEB-RIoShVkvxCS0mIbJ4R76cjJv6N7a4Ep64ObGUs-z0V25Z0XoQDsklmb2qXgp1ukw_eXWCNkWpbnUyRVEHjtS-GkMtYTLBxy9LgyYF-2Ne4aqrufGpLg?key=JHvDPZ5l4fbqXN4lJggYnYL9)
Follow image link: (https://www.crowdcast.io/c/vonagedeepgram?utm_source=deepgram&utm_medium=deepgram&utm_campaign=deepgram)
Caption: 

[Build Real-time Voice Agents with Deepgram in Vonage AI Studio](https://www.crowdcast.io/c/vonagedeepgram?utm_source=deepgram&utm_medium=deepgram&utm_campaign=deepgram)** **- Discover how to build sophisticated AI voice agents by integrating Deepgram's cutting-edge speech-to-text and natural-sounding text-to-speech with Vonage AI Studio. 

You'll receive a step-by-step guide to building agents that understand domain-specific terminology and engage in natural conversations for seamless task completion. 

This webinar is perfect for developers looking to deploy production-ready voice agents with superior accuracy and responsiveness. 

_Hosted by_:

* Benjamin Aronov, Developer Advocate at Vonage

* Tony Chan, Senior Solutions Engineer at Vonage

* Damien Murphy, Applied Engineer at Deepgram

**When**: Wednesday 26th March 2025, 10:00 PT / 12:00 ET / 17:00 GMT

**Where**: Online

**Sign up **[here](https://www.crowdcast.io/c/vonagedeepgram?utm_source=deepgram&utm_medium=deepgram&utm_campaign=deepgram)**!**

----------
View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/18c135d7-112b-4588-8b9f-659e512b4066/div-2.gif?t=1700246279)
Caption: 


----------# 🐝 Social Media Buzz: Karpathy’s latest Deep Dive into LLMs

Tweet:  (https://twitter.com/EvanKirstel/status/1886782922717376533)

———————————————————————————

Tweet:  (https://twitter.com/karpathy/status/1887211193099825254)

———————————————————————————

Hi Jan,

Thank you for the update.
That sounds great.

I will keep an eye out for the DPA and the agreement for signature.

Please let me know if you need any further information from our side to
assist with the onboarding process.

Best regards,
Meghdad

Thank you for sharing the supplier information template, Tofigh.
I’ve completed it and attached it to this email.

Annina, thank you for sending the final version of the DPA.
I can confirm that we agree to this version.

I was wondering Jan if you have any update regarding the agreement's
signature process?
Thank you in advance.

Best,
Meghdad

Hi Meghdad,

Thank you for your swift reply on the missing DPA information. It's all
good now. I assume that you are fine with the small clarification I
inserted regarding the nature of data processing and the aligned changes
that I made regarding the data subjects and data categories affected. I
attached a clean version of the DPA and we wait for our Trust and Assurance
Team to approve the technical and organisational measures described in
Annex 2. After their approval we would be ready to sign the DPA as well.

Best,
Annina

Meghdad

kind request to send it back after reviewing it.

Jan

body_text:
Hi Meghdad, nice to meet you.

Since this will not be a pilot for free, we do not need a precise SOW, but
at least  some kind of order form, where the amount and the duration is
mentioned and also the scope of work.

I can not make the needed changes in the template and have to forward it to
our legal team. And they need a little bit more information than just about
the duration and the amount.

Can you provide such a document? That would be helpful.

Thank you in advance for your support.

Kind regards

Jan

The terms look good to us, with just a few exceptions (likely defaults)
that need adjusting:

2.1, and 6.1).

- The termination terms (duration of no more than 3 months)

If you could update these to be in line with our initial agreement, the
agreement should be fully aligned.

Best regards,
Meghdad

subject: Follow-up: Calibrion AI – Seed Round & Product Walkthrough
body_text:
Dear team at Cathay Innovation,

I hope this message finds you well. I’m following up on my earlier introduction of Calibrion AI and our ongoing EUR 3M seed round.

We are addressing one of the biggest bottlenecks in enterprise AI adoption: dataset creation and annotation for LLMs. Unlike traditional annotation tools, Calibrion is built natively for LLM workflows, delivering:

Up to 35% cost reduction and weeks faster project turnaround

Superior dataset quality through proprietary QC workflows and automation

Strong early traction – with pilots secured both in Europe and the US (incl. a publicly traded German retailer and a $150M‑revenue US apparel brand)

A clear position in a $1–1.4B serviceable obtainable market by 2028 for LLM‑specific tooling

As enterprises increasingly recognize that general‑purpose LLMs require domain‑specific fine‑tuning to reach production grade, we see a massive opportunity emerging — and we believe Cathay’s track record in scaling globally minded, transformative technologies could make for a strong strategic alignment.

I’d be delighted to share our deck in more detail and arrange a short call or live walkthrough of the product. Would you have 30 minutes next week for a quick conversation? I’m flexible and happy to adapt to your availability.

Looking forward to your thoughts.

Best regards,
Nils

--
Finance & Legal ・ Calibrion AI
Tel: +49 (0)30 478 662 25 ・ nils@calibrion.ai <mailto:nils@calibrion.ai>
Französische Str. 20・10117 Berlin・Germany
www.calibrion.ai <http://www.calibrion.ai/>
￼￼￼

> On 1. Aug 2025, at 09:54, Nils Erbach <nils@calibrion.ai> wrote:
> 
> Dear team at Cathay Innovation,
> 
> I hope you are doing well.
> 
> I wanted to follow up on my earlier introduction of Calibrion AI and our EUR 3 million seed round. We’re seeing encouraging momentum with early pilot interest from European and US companies, and we believe this is a strong moment to deepen the conversation with you.
> 
> As mentioned, our focus is on unlocking enterprise adoption of LLMs through proprietary data annotation and fine-tuning — a layer that is essential for turning general models into business-ready, domain-specific solutions. Given Cathay Innovation’s track record in scaling globally minded, transformative tech companies, we feel there is a great strategic alignment.
> 
> I would be glad to share our pitch deck and arrange a short call or product walkthrough to explore the opportunity further and hear your perspective.
> 
> Would you have 30 minutes next week for a quick conversation? I’m flexible and happy to adjust to your schedule.
> 
> Looking forward to your thoughts and hoping we can connect soon.
> 
> Best regards,
> Nils
> 
> --
> Finance & Legal ・ Calibrion AI
> Tel: +49 (0)30 478 662 25 ・ nils@calibrion.ai <>
> Französische Str. 20・10117 Berlin・Germany
> www.calibrion.ai <http://www.calibrion.ai/>
>

> <250719_OnePager Calibrion.pdf>
> 
> <250722_Cathay_Innovation_Investor Letter.pdf>
> 
> 
>> On 22. Jul 2025, at 17:56, Nils Erbach <nils@calibrion.ai> wrote:
>> 
>> Dear team at Cathay Innovation,
>> 
>> I am reaching out to introduce Calibrion AI, a data annotation platform enabling enterprises and organisations to fine-tune LLMs to their proprietary data. We built a working product and already reached pilot-stage interest from European and US companies in the eCom vertical.
>> 
>> While most LLM infra and dev platforms focus on model architecture and LLMOps, we focus on unlocking enterprise adoption through (proprietary) data and fine-tuning workflows.
>> 
>> Calibrion envisions a future where businesses harness their proprietary data and domain expertise to build specialized LLMs, turning generative AI from a threat into a strategic asset for both internal and market-facing applications.
>> 
>> Our mission is to become a market-leading platform for LLM customization and domain adaptation, setting the standard for performance and usability in the enterprise AI space.
>> 
>> To underscore the scale of this opportunity and the importance of what Calibrion does: In June 2025, Meta acquired a 49% stake in Scale AI (a company also focused on LLM data annotation and founded in 2016) for $14.8 billion at a $30 billion valuation. 
>> 
>> We are currently offering subscription for our EUR 3 m seed investment round to: 
>> - expand our engineering and data science team
>> - Accelerate go-to-market efforts across verticals 
>> - Further develop our AI capabilities and integrate new LLM-driven features.
>> 
>> To accelerate the company's development, we assigned significant equity to an option pool for key employees and aim to be cash-flow positive within 18 months.
>> 
>> We would be happy to share our pitch deck and schedule a call to walk you through the live product. The product is fully developed and currently undergoing regular testing and stabilization.
>> 
>> Please find attached a letter outlining our fund-raising goals as well as a one-pager on Calibrion.
>> 
>> We look forward to hearing from you and would be glad to schedule a conversation at your convenience.
>> 
>> Best regards,

subject: B2B SaaS – Product ready - Zalando SE paid pilot secured – Seed Round kEUR 600; Calibrion.ai - AI Infrastructure / Data annotation
body_text:
Dear Team at STS Ventures,

We are building Calibrion, an agent-native data annotation platform adressing one of the largest barriers to organisational GenAI adoption: enabling proprietary LLM training through high-quality, rapid annotation. 

Calibrion delivers: 
- Agentic data annotation that accelerates annotation up to 170x (from months to hours)
- Cost savings of around 90%
- Built-in proprietary quality control to ensure accuracy at scale 
- 35% faster human-in-the-loop through research driven optimized workflows

We recently signed a 6 months paid pilot with Zalando SE, secured a verbal commitment from Siemens Energy AG E-Commerce division, and are negotiating pilots with Cotopaxi (US sustainable outdoor brand) and LILT (AI-driven translation leader). 

We are seeking EUR 600,000 in seed funding to expand our team, onboard additional clients, and implement product-led-growth.

Our founder and CEO, Meghdad, Holds a PhD in Computer Science with a specialization in Natural Language Processing, and has over eight years of applied AI product experience. 

Given your investment focus, we think Calibrion could be a strong fit. You’ll find our one-pager, pitch-deck, and product demos attached. We’d be glad to arrange a 30-minute call to walk you through the product and discuss and our upcoming milestones.

Best regards,
Nils 


Finance & Legal ・ Calibrion AI
Tel: +49 1 <tel:+49+(0)30+478+662+25>7662205065 ・ nils@calibrion.ai <mailto:meghdad@calibrion.ai>
Kolonnenstr. 8・10827 Berlin・Germany
www.calibrion.ai <https://www.calibrion.ai/>

subject: Follow-up: Calibrion AI – Seed Round & Live Product Demo
body_text:
Dear team at Lunar Ventures,

I hope this message finds you well. I’m following up on my earlier note regarding Calibrion AI and our ongoing EUR 3M seed round.

We’re tackling one of the toughest bottlenecks in generative AI: enabling enterprises to customize and fine-tune LLMs with their proprietary data. Unlike traditional annotation platforms repurposed from legacy ML workflows, Calibrion is built natively for LLMs, delivering:

Up to 35% lower annotation costs and weeks faster turnaround times

Superior dataset quality via proprietary QC workflows and automation

Strong early traction – with pilots secured both in Europe and the US, including a publicly traded German retailer and a $150M-revenue US apparel brand

A defined role in a $1–1.4B serviceable obtainable market by 2028 for LLM-specific training data tools

As enterprises move rapidly from general-purpose models toward domain-specific fine-tuning workflows, we believe this layer will define the next phase of enterprise AI adoption.

Given Lunar Ventures’ focus on deep tech and technical breakthroughs at early stage, we feel there’s a strong fit. I’d be delighted to share our deck and arrange a short call or live demo to walk you through the product and roadmap.

Would you be available next week for a brief conversation? I’m flexible and happy to adapt to your schedule.

Looking forward to your thoughts.

Best regards,
Nils

--
Finance & Legal ・ Calibrion AI
Tel: +49 (0)30 478 662 25 ・ nils@calibrion.ai <mailto:nils@calibrion.ai>
Französische Str. 20・10117 Berlin・Germany
www.calibrion.ai <http://www.calibrion.ai/>

￼
￼ ￼

> On 1. Aug 2025, at 09:58, Nils Erbach <nils@calibrion.ai> wrote:
> 
> Dear team at Lunar Ventures,
> 
> I hope this message finds you well.
> 
> I wanted to follow up on my previous email regarding Calibrion AI and our EUR 3 million seed round. We continue to see strong momentum, with pilot-stage interest from multiple companies in Europe and the US, confirming the clear need for enterprise-grade LLM customization based on proprietary data.
> 
> Given Lunar Ventures’ focus on deep tech and early-stage technical breakthroughs, I believe Calibrion aligns strongly with your investment thesis. I would love to share our pitch deck and arrange a short call to walk you through our live product, our traction so far, and how we plan to scale.
> 
> Would you have time next week for a quick conversation? I’m happy to adjust to your availability.
> 
> Looking forward to your thoughts and hoping we can connect soon.
> 
> Best regards,
> Nils
> 
> --
> Finance & Legal ・ Calibrion AI
> Tel: +49 (0)30 478 662 25 ・ nils@calibrion.ai <>
> Französische Str. 20・10117 Berlin・Germany
> www.calibrion.ai <http://www.calibrion.ai/>
> 
> 
> <250719_OnePager Calibrion.pdf>
> 
> <250719_Lunar_Ventures_Investor Letter.pdf>
> 
> 
>> On 22. Jul 2025, at 10:22, Nils Erbach <nils@calibrion.ai> wrote:
>> 
>> Dear team at Lunar Ventures,
>> 
>> I am reaching out to introduce Calibrion AI, a data annotation platform enabling enterprises and organisations to fine-tune LLMs to their proprietary data. We built a working product and already reached pilot-stage interest from European and US companies in the eCom vertical.
>> 
>> While most LLM infra and dev platforms focus on model architecture and LLMOps, we focus on unlocking enterprise adoption through (proprietary) data and fine-tuning workflows.
>> 
>> Calibrion envisions a future where businesses harness their proprietary data and domain expertise to build specialized LLMs, turning generative AI from a threat into a strategic asset for both internal and market-facing applications.
>> 
>> Our mission is to become a market-leading platform for LLM customization and domain adaptation, setting the standard for performance and usability in the enterprise AI space.
>> 
>> To underscore the scale of this opportunity and the importance of what Calibrion does: In June 2025, Meta acquired a 49% stake in Scale AI (a company also focused on LLM data annotation and founded in 2016) for $14.8 billion at a $30 billion valuation. 
>> 
>> We are currently offering subscription for our EUR 3 m seed investment round to: 
>> - expand our engineering and data science team
>> - Accelerate go-to-market efforts across verticals 
>> - Further develop our AI capabilities and integrate new LLM-driven features.
>> 
>> To accelerate the company's development, we assigned significant equity to an option pool for key employees and aim to be cash-flow positive within 18 months.
>> 
>> We would be happy to share our pitch deck and schedule a call to walk you through the live product. The product is fully developed and currently undergoing regular testing and stabilization.
>> 
>> Please find attached a letter outlining our fund-raising goals as well as a one-pager on Calibrion.
>> 
>> We look forward to hearing from you and would be glad to schedule a conversation at your convenience.
>> 
>> Best regards,
>> Nils
>> 
>> -- 
>> Finance & Legal ・ Calibrion AI
>> Tel: +49 (0)30 478 662 25 <tel:+49+(0)30+478+662+25> ・ nils@calibrion.ai <mailto:meghdad@calibrion.ai>
>> Französische Str. 20・10117 Berlin・Germany
>> www.calibrion.ai <http://www.calibrion.ai/>
>> 
>> 
>

subject: Ben Horowitz's 5 Lessons for Founders and CEOs
body_text:
View this post on the web at https://speedrun.substack.com/p/ben-horowitz-5-lessons-for-founders-and-ceos

💡  This Week’s Big Ideas
🤖  Is AI a bubble? Find out this Thursday by attending our live Office Hours with Exponential View’s Azeem Azhar. Register on Partiful to attend [ https://substack.com/redirect/ec5920d9-8218-40f2-96f7-5900c6025c4c?j=eyJ1IjoiNTRjbDB4In0.woIuZ60MffrlGDsdpn_3Gb8spbUfXffYo0aHcFuwcjU ].
